description: Repeated governance-heavy work should recommend a value heartbeat.

concreteNextStep.objective: decide whether to continue engineering depth or shift toward concrete project capability/value
concreteNextStep.verification: confirm the next accepted action has target, objective, verification, and stop gate
concreteNextStep.stopCondition: stop if value sources conflict or the next action changes route, scope, public behavior, provider/defaults, release, or destructive behavior
